text:
SPECIALTY_NPI_IN_PRIM 
 Specialty of EP billing most primary care services in practice 

 TOTCOST 
 Total payment-standardized Medicare FFS cost 

 OTHER_ALL 
 Total costs for all other services 

 MINOR_PROCS_INGRP 
 Total costs for ambulatory/minor procedures billed by EPs in practice 

 MINOR_PROCS_OTHGRP 
 Total costs for ambulatory/minor procedures billed by EPs outside practice 

 TOTAL_ANC 
 Total costs for ancillary services 

 ALL_EANDM_INGRP 
 Total costs for E and M services
